_comment: Reference settings for browsing the anonymized demo DB manually (e.g. copy this into Rvnx.CRM.Web/ and run `dotnet run --project Rvnx.CRM.Web`). Auth is off so the global query filter (e.GroupId == _currentUserService.GroupId) matches the demo rows, which all have GroupId=NULL. The docs-build harness does NOT read this file — it passes the same overrides as command-line args.
